titleStmt.title: SII 8.491: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 491. (A.R. No. 192 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiThe record is left unfinished. . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvara pūrvvadakṣiṇapaścimasamudrādhipati śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvara rājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa hari hararā yaṉukku cellāniṉṟa śakābdam Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟu Irupattumūṉṟu mel cellāniṉṟa pra samvatsara ttu
mulattu nāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Āṟṟūrnāṭṭu tirukkāḷattiāna mummuṭicoḻapurattu sarvvadevatāśiromaṇi Āna śrīkāḷa hastinātha ṉukku Amarendragiriśrīpādaṅka ḷ śiṣyarāna pūrṇagiriśrīpādaṅka ḷ kuṭutta dharmmaśāsanam . Inta śrīkāḷaha[stinātha] ṉukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Uccikālattil nammiṭa perāle Amutuce
nāḷāka Amutupaṭi Iraṇṭumarakkāl nāḻi neyamutu Āḻākku paruppamutu Uri pullakaṇṭam Uḻakku kaṟiamutu miḷakuamutu Uppurācikkum pukkukācu Oṉṟu pakal nālucāmamum Irā nālucāmamum ṉāyaṉār tirumunpu Iṭum viḷakku muṉṟukku Eṇṇai muuḻakkum nammiṭa perile Eḻuntaruḷum mācittirunāḷukkum paṅkūṉittirunāḷ
ṭu Oṉṟukku Irupattunālu vaṭṭi nellukkum poykaināṭṭil nammiṭa bhikṣāpātramāna pūmanppaḷḷi Ellaimuṟṟum nañcai puñcai nilattil Uḷḷūril nām pratiṣṭi tta grāmade vatai Āna śrīkāḷahasti nātha ṉukku tevatānamāka Inta ṉāyaṉār caṉṉatiyilc ciṟṟerikiḻe sarvvamānnyamā ka kuḻi Irupatum periyaerikiḻe kuḻi Añapatu
kku teṟkku nāṉ kaṭṭuvitta tāṅkal Añcūrvatikku meṟkku kāṭṭamaceṭṭi kaṭṭuvitta taṉmakkuḷakkaraikku teṟkku ciṟṟeri kaṭaitoppukku kiḻakku Añcūr Ellaikku vaṭakku Inta nāṟpāṟkellaiyil Inta grā mattil nāyaṉāṟku pātiyum Eṉṉuṭaiya cū śiṣyan vatsagotra ttu pai Iḷaiyaperumāḷ makaṉ ceThe inscription is built in at the ends of lines.
Digital edition of SII 8.491 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
